chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.S-420 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on M.A No.7721/2024 2. For hearing of main case 27.10.2025 None is present on behalf of the petitioner. No intimation is received. For the reasons to be record, the petition is hereby dismissed. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
